criteria_results.description: EditorObject in client/src/lib/types.ts has optional field `photos?: string[]`
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/lib/types.ts:31: `photos?: string[];` added to EditorObject type.

criteria_results.description: EditorAction union in types.ts includes both ADD_OBJECT_PHOTO (payload: {id: string; photoDataUrl: string}) and REMOVE_OBJECT_PHOTO (payload: {id: string; index: number})
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/lib/types.ts:105-106: Both actions added to EditorAction union with correct payloads.

criteria_results.description: editorReducer in editor-context.tsx handles ADD_OBJECT_PHOTO by appending photoDataUrl to the matching object's photos array, and REMOVE_OBJECT_PHOTO by filtering out the photo at the given index
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx:234-250: Implemented cases for both actions using immutable map and filter/spread operations.

criteria_results.description: File client/src/core/image-compress.ts exists and exports a function `compressImage` with signature `(file: File) => Promise<string>`
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/core/image-compress.ts:5: `export async function compressImage(file: File): Promise<string>` implemented with canvas resizing (1200px max) and quality 0.75 JPEG export.

criteria_results.description: File client/src/components/editor/ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx exists and accepts props { objectId: string; photos: string[] }
PropertiesPanel.tsx renders ObjectPhotoGallery when exactly one object is selected (isMultiSelect is false), passing firstObject.id and firstObject.photos
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/components/editor/PropertiesPanel.tsx:191-197: Gallery rendered conditionally under `!isMultiSelect` with correct props.

criteria_results.description: handleExportProject in useExport.ts iterates obj.photos and calls toDataUrl on each item, replacing any blob: URLs with data URLs before JSON serialization
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/hooks/useExport.ts:66-68: `updatedObj.photos = await Promise.all(obj.photos.map(photo => toDataUrl(photo)));` within the finalObjects map.

criteria_results.description: IMPORT_PROJECT reducer case in editor-context.tsx already spreads the full payload including objects with their photos arrays — no additional import-side code needed
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx:183: `case 'IMPORT_PROJECT': return { ...state, ...action.payload };` properly handles state restoration.

suggestions: Consider adding a loading state during image compression if multiple large photos are uploaded at once, although for current max-width and quality settings it should be fast.
The lightbox navigation currently wraps around using modulo; consider adding visual indicators for first/last if you prefer a non-wrapping UX, but current implementation is functional.
